Administrasi,SHAPE_Length,-1,-1;SHAPE_Area "SHAPE_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0 ,First,#,Area Batas Wilayah Administrasi,SHAPE_Area,-1,-1" #
CalculateField "Area Batas Wilayah Administrasi Kecamatan" FCODE [FCODE]=BA03070040 VB #
CalculateField "Area Batas Wilayah Administrasi Kecamatan" FCODE !FCODE!."BA03070040" PYTHON_9.3 #
CalculateField "Area Batas Wilayah Administrasi Kecamatan" NAMOBJ "[NAMOBJ]= [WADMKC]" VB #
CalculateField "Area Batas Wilayah Administrasi Kecamatan" NAMOBJ "[NAMOBJ] = [WADMKC]" VB #
CalculateField "Area Batas Wilayah Administrasi Kecamatan" FCODE "!FCODE! .replace("", "BA03070040")" PYTHON_9.3 #
CalculateField "Area Batas Wilayah Administrasi Kecamatan" FCODE "!FCODE! .replace("<Null>", "BA03070040")" PYTHON_9.3 #

CalculateField "Area Batas Wilayah Administrasi Kecamatan" FCODE updateValue( !FCODE! ) PYTHON_9.3 "def updateValue(value):
 if value == None:
 return 'BA03070040'
 else: return value"
CalculateField "Area Batas Wilayah Administrasi Kecamatan" NAMOBJ [WADMKC] VB #

Dissolve "Area Batas Wilayah Administrasi Kecamatan" C:\Users\think\OneDrive\Firman\OneDrive\Documents\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\ADMINISTRASI_AR_10K_KECAMATA FCODE;SRS_ID;KDBBPS;KDPBPS;KDPKAB;KDPPUM;LUASWH;WADMKK;WADMPR;WIADKK;WIADPR # MULTI_PART DISSOLVE_LINES

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
